description: Archived V1.34 P2 (FL-E preset chain) plan per Profile B. Required substantial rework (3 fix waves) due to schedule-create DTO mismatch + missing e2e coverage.
title: V1.34 P2 — FL-E preset chain
qc: Wave 1: 3 Request Changes (4 Critical total: 2+2+0). Wave 2 (after fix wave 2 DTO+facade+atomicity+e2e): qc1+2 still Request Changes (CLI creator_id empty string bug), qc3 Request Changes. Wave 3 (after fix wave 3 CLI creator_id from config): qc1 Approve, qc2 Approve (from wave 2), qc3 Approve w/ residuals (4 minor deferred to V1.34+: W-2 TOCTOU test, W-3 audit gap, S-1 panic risk, S-2 API batching).
qa: Pass w/ notes after PM lifecycle corrections (plan Markdown status sync is PM responsibility, not functional issue). 11 fl_e_chain_demo e2e tests + 5 fl_e_schedule_api hermetic API tests pass.

notes: 13 commits total: 4 P2 work + 2 fix wave 2 + 1 fix wave 3 + 2 harness (InReview + residuals) + 4 QC reports (wave 1 + reval) + 1 QA. 5 hermetic e2e tests cover DTO shape, seed→core_context, creator isolation, no-seed, empty-creator-id isolation. Fix wave 3 implementer noted V1.33 `creator run start` has same creator_id empty-string bug (line 175, 222) — separate V1.33+ hygiene issue to address in future plan.
